title: Agent-ready three-repository ecosystem
positioning: A public portfolio slice that presents automation execution, sample review, and agent workflow orchestration as separate but connected project surfaces.

repositories.name: autoscript-public
repositories.role: worker runtime and playback automation facade
repositories.handoff: accepts planned automation work and returns structured worker reports

repositories.name: autoSampler-public
repositories.role: post-capture sampling, review evidence, and artifact packaging layer
repositories.handoff: turns captured media units into review decisions, images, JSON, Markdown, and site artifacts

repositories.name: clawscript
repositories.role: agent workflow orchestration and multi-repository coordination layer
repositories.handoff: coordinates which repo should execute, review, package, or publish each step
